feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Ties That Bind
entry.summary:
Author: Rnl1993

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,675Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 76

Summary: Dean and Sam grew up stopping by the Stilinski's house throughout the years. When Stiles ends up in the hospital due to a supernatural accident, Papa Stilinski decides to send Stiles with Dean for the summer to get properly trained. After all, he knows Stiles won't stop helping his friends and the best way to prepare him is to be trained by someone whose life is dedicated to dealing with the supernatural.ORThe one where the Winchesters grow up in a drastically different way and are pretty much adopted by the Stilinski's. The Hale's get a happy life rewrite and everything canon is pretty much changed to suit my needs. Originally called 'Echoes in our Lives'

entry.title: The fire´s memory
entry.summary:
Author: Tresaure

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,036Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The official truth about the fire that consumed the Hale family is starting to crack: the ashes hide inconsistencies, dark pacts, and an impossible-to-ignore question mark: A girl named Paige.How is it possible for her to be there if death was supposed to have taken her years ago?

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,064Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 69

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Someone Else's Tupperware
entry.summary:
Author: ModeratelyScathed

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,760Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 122

Summary: The funny thing is, Stiles actually has no idea who just climbed through his window. Doesn't really care, either. All he wants to do is catch a few hours of uninterrupted sleep before the nightmares drag him back to consciousness.Again.Still, he expects some sort of snarky response if it's Derek or Peter. Or maybe the vocal embodiment of Scott's puppy dog eyes if it's his best friend.He doesn't expect several seconds of silence.And he definitely doesn't expect the sudden and unmistakable thump of a body hitting the ground.

entry.title: on the skyline
entry.summary:
Author: sterek24 (mooncry89)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,581Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Following the fall of the Nogitsune (for the last time, if everything actually worked out in Stiles's favor), he's still having some strange dreams and there's new bad guys stumbling into Beacon Hills all the time. The Hale pack will have to work together to figure out what the newest creature feature is and just why Stiles seems to be at the middle of it all, because isn't he always?

entry.title: Inhibitions, or lack of
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,008Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 47

Summary: I was having a normal morning. Eating questionable rice. Wearing my "I’m the hot girl that every guy wants " hoodie. The usual domestic bliss. I opened the door. And there was Derek. Derek Hale. Derek Hale From Beacon Hills. Holding the hand of a young boy who looked approximately ten years old. With luggage. Multiple duffle bags. And those rolling suitcases. The kind you take when you're not coming back anytime soon. Why is Derek Hale from Beacon Hills, standing on my doorstep? How does he even know where I live. "Derek," I said, because my brain needed a second to process. "What's—" "I'm staying here from now on," he said, barging past me before I could form a coherent objection. "And I prefer a fall wedding. Color scheme, blue and gold." I blinked. I blinked again.I opened my mouth to respond, to question, to perhaps ask if this was some elaborate prank or if I'd accidentally wandered into an alternate dimension, And then Derek Hale, Mr. Sourwolf himself who hadn't voluntarily touched me in approximately eight years, grabbed my face with both hands and kissed me. On the mouth. With tongue.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Rebuilding my world around you
entry.summary:
Author: allthefandoms84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,448Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Derek doesn't know how he got here. How he was talked into rebuilding his pack, his family home and his heart. That's not true, he knows exactly how. Stiles Stilinski. It always comes back to him.

entry.title: The Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Nyx_A

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,013Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 27

Summary: Seems like everyone BUT Stiles is in on a secret involving Stiles and Derek yet no one is willing to help the poor human and let him know. Meanwhile Derek is trying desperately to not show any emotions that might hint at the truth. All of this is going on when the pack is under attack by a strange wolf pack threatening to take over the Hale land.

entry.title: Sparked: Part 1
entry.summary:
Author: HitopCub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 379,431Chapters: 25/44Kudos: 53

Summary: “Your spark has always been there, waiting to be ignited. Now it’s your time to shine.” Stiles Stilinski left Beacon Hills with a leather-bound grimoire and a heart full of secrets—including the fact that in another reality, he’s already married to the man who gave it to him. Now, tucked away on the 13th floor of a Silicon Valley tech giant, Stiles is diving into six months of intensive training with a prestigious coven. He’s navigating a world where ancient magic meets cutting-edge tech, juggling unpredictable spark powers, and trying to keep his interdimensional past under wraps. But the 13th floor holds more than just spellbooks. Between a sinister presence sabotaging his training and whispers of a spy in the coven, Stiles is realizing that some secrets are more dangerous than his own. Master your magic. Don't spill the truth. And whatever you do, don't let Derek Hale see how much you remember.

entry.title: The Extremely Unofficial Guide to Beacon Hills Boarding School
entry.summary:
Author: randomreader46

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,177Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Winning a scholarship to Beacon Hills Preparatory is supposed to be Stiles Stilinski’s fresh start.Instead, he gets rich kids with trust funds, a campus that looks suspiciously like a murder mystery setting, a new best friend within approximately ten minutes, and Derek Hale — Beacon’s perpetually scowling lacrosse captain, who seems to dislike Stiles on sight.Honestly? Rude.______________________Tags will update as the fic progresses to prevent spoilers

entry.title: Same But Different
entry.summary:
Author: Reiko009

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,604Chapters: 9/13Kudos: 162

Summary: “Let me help, love.” The new pet name was only used when they were alone like this. Somehow the word was both too weak to describe what their coupling actually meant and a far more intimate endearment than what Derek felt that he deserved. What they were doing wasn’t love so much as need. He could sense his wolf curling protectively around what belonged to him, what anchored him, and what strengthened him as the Alpha. True, his pack was small: just him and Peter. But that was enough – for now. A spicy reimagining of Season 2. Old foes and a new threat emerge, all while the Hale wolves begin to fall for a very human high schooler with deep brown eyes and a loud mouth. Expect a lot of familiar plot points from the canon, just with a twist. Mostly an excuse to write uncle/nephew werewolf smut.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,313Chapters: 19/40Kudos: 42

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up with Stiles Stilinski as a lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief time where they are in an A/B/O AU and where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much, so you can make your own choices. This story was originally my NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,571Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.title: The Road to Sacramento
entry.summary:
Author: hyacinth_fiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,366Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 84

Summary: The universe has a wonderful sense of timing and Stiles and co. are thrown into all kinds of antics when the world goes to hell in a handbasket. Join them as they journey away from the security of their old lives and towards the hope of a new safety. Do they make it? I suppose you'll have to read on to find out. This story is going to be slow burn, like that languid yearning we all know and love seasoned with well-ripened apocalypse angst. There will be spice in this tale, eventually. Solid trigger warning for canon-typical blood/violence, casual swearing, and some other bits I'll stick in the notes of the relevant chapters

entry.title: underground
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,378Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 41

Summary: Derek’s claws reach out for Stiles like a lifeline. The hunters hold him back and he writhes and snarls in their grip. Stiles’ face across from him in the forest is a mirror of his own, desperate and haunted and terrified, angry and wild. They reach for each other, but it’s fruitless; they’re too far apart, and the men are dragging Stiles backwards, away from Derek, further and further from him. Derek roars, spit flying everywhere and sharp teeth snapping at the hunters surrounding him, but his red eyes stay glued to his mate. He thrashes, Stiles’ cries and yells echoing in his ears over the sound of his own rapid heartbeat. At last he turns around in the hunters’ grasp, intending to slash their throats out with a swipe of his claws, but a needle plunges into his own neck, and his world fades to black. The last thing he hears is the mournful, harrowed, desperate sound of his own name on Stiles’ lips. The forest goes dark around him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
